{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Fisher’s Treatment of the Aion Sea
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Fisher’s Treatment of the Aion Sea]] is a text mentioned by [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Fisher's]] Treatment of the [[Aion Sea]] is a text that acts as a conduit to the [[Great Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|"It's a conduit straight to the Great Elders."<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
